# A2A-SIN-Worker-heypiggy

Autonomous HeyPiggy survey worker agent for OpenSIN-AI.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/A2A-SIN-Worker-heypiggy/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [Contributing](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/A2A-SIN-Worker-heypiggy/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute

## Key Information
- License: MIT
- Language: Python 3.13+
- Models: NVIDIA Llama 3.2-11B (Primary), Gemini 3 Flash (Fallback)
- Repo: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/A2A-SIN-Worker-heypiggy
